title: ai-dev-kit project adapter
description: Per-project parameters read by ai-dev-kit skills at run time. Every field is optional — a skill missing a field derives it from the repo (and says so) rather than failing.

packageManager.description: Shapes registry queries and script invocations.

gate.description: Commands, run in order, that make up the full verification gate (lint, type-check, build). An array — never a '&&' chain — so it runs on any shell.

prodVerify.description: How live-verify serves a production build without disturbing a standing dev server.

start.description: Serves the production build on the dedicated port.

port.description: Dedicated prod-verify port (never the dev port).

notes.description: Env/origin facts an agent needs before driving flows.

cache.description: The local build cache that grows without bound, and how to measure/prune it.

contextDir.description: Agent context docs, loaded on demand.

archiveDir.description: Where audit reports and archived history land.

trailers.description: false = never add Co-Authored-By or other trailers.

useFileFlag.description: true = write the message to a file and use git commit -F (survives PowerShell 5.1 quoting).

workflow.description: The workflow to watch to green at a session-ending checkpoint.

devPorts.description: Ports where orphaned dev/prod servers may linger.

e2eUserPattern.description: Email pattern identifying throwaway e2e users in the local DB.

keepContainers.description: Docker containers tidy must never prune.

releaseAgeDays.description: Prefer the newest version at least this many days old.

exactPin.description: Packages that publish frequently — always pin exact.
